name: Generative AI - Maarga
description: Built Maarga, an AI resume analyzer using RAG, LangChain, and LangGraph for real-time resume-JD matching and feedback.
details:
## Overview
Maarga compares resumes against job descriptions and gives practical feedback for better alignment.

## What it includes
- Resume and JD analysis
- Retrieval-augmented generation for matching
- Actionable suggestions for improvement

## Tech notes
The project uses LangChain, LangGraph, and vector-backed retrieval to keep the response grounded in the input documents.

## Repository
- [Open the source code](https://github.com/hegde-shashi/Maarga)

name: Medical ChatBot
description: Built a Medical Bot using LLM workflows, RAG, and vector search to deliver accurate responses to healthcare-related queries.
details:
## Overview
This chatbot helps answer healthcare-related questions using retrieval and language models.

## What it includes
- LLM workflow orchestration
- Vector search for context retrieval
- Response generation with grounded sources

## Notes
You can expand the knowledge base with additional medical documents or domain-specific sources.

## Repository
- [Open the source code](https://github.com/hegde-shashi/Medical_ChatBot)

name: House Price Prediction
description: Analyzed a dataset of house features and prices to build a regression model that predicts house prices based on various attributes.
details:
## Overview
A collection of machine learning work covering both classification and regression problems.

## What it includes
- Feature engineering and data preparation
- Model selection and comparison
- Performance evaluation and iteration

## Good follow-up additions
- Add charts for metrics
- Add a model comparison table
- Include notebooks or demo datasets

## Repository
- [Open the profile repository](https://github.com/hegde-shashi)
